text: 1720 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَا عَالَ اِمْرُؤٌ فِي اِقْتِصَادٍ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1720 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"A person who practices moderation will never face poverty.

text: 1721 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنِ اِقْتَصَدَ أَنْ لاَ يَفْتَقِرَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1721 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"I guarantee for the one who practices moderation that they will not face poverty."
